title: Orb Of Origin Recipe
description: Recipe for Orb of Origin - Feel free to use, i did rly simple recipe u can get in less then first hour of playing, if u dont like the Origin u pick!
body:
You can quickly and easily create the Orb of Origins! If you don’t like the Origin you chose at the start, you should be able to create the orb within an hour to change it! It's not that easy though :P But maybe within that hour, you’ll end up liking the Origin you picked! :D

![A Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cea06ed9e49fe9781b4ec3ef052d9b47bcc13af4.png)
